title: pecteilis bassacensis
intro: Pecteilis bassacensis, also known as the golden orchid or Bassac golden orchid, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Vietnam. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Pecteilis bassacensis is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies and pharmaceutical products.
